goal: Refresh the v0 release blocker recertification after FE v6 Export workflow unlock, proving the current HEAD still has only the expected real-adapter/no-fake-endpoint blocker.
head: 2686c78
blocked_scope: Product code, backend, schema, worker, runtime, frontend, tests, scripts, preset, fixture, or mockup changes
Changing verifier acceptance criteria, release readiness logic, model catalog, M6 review docs, or evidence policy
Inventing real adapter, endpoint, Docker, benchmark, package, export, or release evidence
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may only refresh current-head release recertification output artifacts using existing strict scripts, then update LLM handoff docs and completion log. It must keep the expected NOT_GO release decision.
required_evidence: V0 readiness remains NOT_GO with unexpected_blockers empty and real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole v0 blocker.
Real adapter bundle verification remains NOT_GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE and does not claim release readiness.
Docs identify artifacts/review/verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh as the primary external CUDA host action.
No M6-RC GO or v0 release GO is claimed.
warnings: This gate refreshes local NOT_GO diagnostics only; it cannot produce real adapter endpoint evidence on this host.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Refresh current-head release blocker diagnostics after FE v6 Export unlock using existing strict scripts.
phase_notes.audit: Previous recertification artifacts predate the latest FE v6 workflow unlock commits; release docs should reflect the current HEAD and show no new unexpected blockers.
phase_notes.build: Run the recertification runner, inspect generated NOT_GO artifacts, update LLM docs and completion log with current-head results.
phase_notes.check: Validate JSON artifacts, search for expected NOT_GO/action markers, and run diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this recertification refresh phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Refresh current-head v0 release blocker recertification artifacts and LLM handoff docs only, preserving expected NOT_GO release state.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code/test/script/spec/mockup changes, no release GO claim, no M6 review GO edits, no verifier/evidence-policy weakening, no model weights/adapters/images/endpoint transcripts/evidence bundles.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
